settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your DataScout Pro experience.
settings.chooseEngineHelp: Choose the engine used for all background tracking and quick scans.
settings.hybridHelp: Hybrid is recommended. It uses the fastest method available and automatically deploys highly evasive headless browsers if CAPTCHAs are detected.
settings.proxyHelp: Use free proxies to avoid IP blocks entirely before upgrading to a paid solution.
settings.darkModeHelp: Reduced eye strain in low-light environments
settings.versionInfo: DataScout Pro v0.1.0 — Market Intelligence Platform

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.resultsDesc: Here are the latest gathered data for your trackers. The table updates automatically every minute.
monitoring.settingsDesc: Here are all items scheduled for scraping. You can add new ones using the Action Button (bottom right).
monitoring.historyNotSupported: History for type '{{type}}' is not supported yet.
monitoring.noSearchHistory: No search results history available. Waiting for next scan.

dashboard.totalScrapedTooltip: Total number of tracked products in the database.
dashboard.estMarginTooltip: Projected total profit (after deducting FBA fees & cost).
dashboard.avgPriceTooltip: Average selling price across all scraped products.
dashboard.avgValueTooltip: How profitable the products are on average (score for good discounts & ratings).
dashboard.fbaShareTooltip: Percentage of sellers using Fulfillment by Amazon.
dashboard.marketTrustTooltip: Average customer trust. Based on reviews count, ratings, and Choice badges.
dashboard.bestFindTooltip: Chance to find a 'gold mine': most promising product (huge discount & low competition).
dashboard.coverageTooltip: Percentage of complete key metrics (Title, Price, Brand, Image, Availability).
dashboard.priceStabilityTooltip: Percentage of products without abnormal price jumps (>30%).

table.noProducts: No products scraped yet. Try running a scrape task above.
